data.title: Image Toolkit
data.notes: Convert image formats, resize, crop, and add effects using the canvas-plus library.

params.title: Canvas Options
params.caption: Set options for the canvas-plus library.  [Learn More](https://github.com/jhuckaby/canvas-plus#parameters)

params.title: Resize
params.caption: Optionally resize each input image before any other operations are applied.  [Learn More](https://github.com/jhuckaby/canvas-plus#resize)

params.title: Target Width
params.caption: Desired output width in pixels. Leave blank to preserve aspect ratio from height.

params.title: Target Height
params.caption: Desired output height in pixels. Leave blank to preserve aspect ratio from width.

params.title: Scale Multiplier
params.caption: Optional scale multiplier such as `0.5` or `2`. When set, it takes precedence over width and height.

params.title: Resize Mode
params.value: Fit - Contain Aspect Ratio [fit], FitPad - Contain with Padding [fitpad], FitOver - Cover and Crop [fitover], Scale - Exact Dimensions [scale]
params.caption: Choose how the source image should fit into the target dimensions.

params.title: Padding Background
params.caption: Background color used by FitPad mode.

params.title: Resize Direction
params.value: Both - Shrink or Enlarge [both], Shrink Only [shrink], Enlarge Only [enlarge]
params.caption: Limit resizing to shrinking, enlarging, or both.

params.title: Alignment
params.value: Center [center], North [north], Northeast [northeast], East [east], Southeast [southeast], South [south], Southwest [southwest], West [west], Northwest [northwest]
params.caption: Alignment used by FitPad and FitOver modes.

params.title: Image Operation
params.caption: Choose one canvas-plus operation to apply after optional resizing.

tools.title: (None)
tools.description: Skip the optional filter step.

tools.title: Adjustments
tools.description: Adjust brightness, contrast, color, lighting, gamma, and normalization.  [Learn More](https://github.com/jhuckaby/canvas-plus#adjust)

fields.title: Normalize
fields.caption: Auto-enhance the image by stretching channel values.

fields.title: Adjustment Channels
fields.value: RGB [rgb], RGBA [rgba], Red [r], Green [g], Blue [b], Alpha [a]
fields.caption: Channels used by lighting, gamma and normalize.

tools.title: Blur
tools.description: Apply a fast box blur.  [Learn More](https://github.com/jhuckaby/canvas-plus#blur)

fields.title: Amount
fields.caption: Blur amount. Higher values are stronger and slower.

fields.title: Edge Mode
fields.value: Repeat [repeat], Wrap [wrap], Mirror [mirror], Discard [discard]
fields.caption: How out-of-bounds pixels are handled.

fields.title: Channels
fields.value: RGBA [rgba], RGB [rgb], Red [r], Green [g], Blue [b], Alpha [a]
fields.caption: Channels to blur.

tools.title: Border
tools.description: Draw a border around or inside the image.  [Learn More](https://github.com/jhuckaby/canvas-plus#border)

fields.title: Mode
fields.value: Inside [inside], Center [center], Outside [outside]
fields.caption: Where the border is drawn relative to the image edge.

tools.title: Composite
tools.description: Composite another image on top of the input image.  [Learn More](https://github.com/jhuckaby/canvas-plus#composite)

fields.title: Overlay Image
fields.caption: Local path, or URL for the overlay image.

fields.title: Overlay Width
fields.caption: Optional overlay resize width. Use `0` to preserve original width.

fields.title: Overlay Height
fields.caption: Optional overlay resize height. Use `0` to preserve original height.

fields.title: Alignment
fields.value: Center [center], North [north], Northeast [northeast], East [east], Southeast [southeast], South [south], Southwest [southwest], West [west], Northwest [northwest]
fields.caption: Overlay alignment.

fields.title: Composite Mode
fields.value: Source Over [source-over], Source In [source-in], Source Out [source-out], Source Atop [source-atop], Destination Over [destination-over], Destination In [destination-in], Destination Out [destination-out], Destination Atop [destination-atop], Lighter [lighter], Copy [copy], XOR [xor], Multiply [multiply], Screen [screen], Overlay [overlay], Darken [darken], Lighten [lighten], Color Dodge [color-dodge], Color Burn [color-burn], Hard Light [hard-light], Soft Light [soft-light], Difference [difference], Exclusion [exclusion], Hue [hue], Saturation [saturation], Color [color], Luminosity [luminosity]
fields.caption: Canvas compositing operation.

fields.title: Anti-Aliasing
fields.value: Best [best], Good [good], Fast [fast], Nearest [nearest]
fields.caption: Scaling quality for the overlay image.

tools.title: Convolve
tools.description: Apply a custom convolution kernel.  [Learn More](https://github.com/jhuckaby/canvas-plus#convolve)

fields.title: Edge Mode
fields.value: Repeat [repeat], Wrap [wrap], Mirror [mirror], Discard [discard]
fields.caption: How out-of-bounds pixels are handled.

fields.title: Channels
fields.value: RGBA [rgba], RGB [rgb], Red [r], Green [g], Blue [b], Alpha [a]
fields.caption: Channels to convolve.

tools.title: Crop
tools.description: Crop each image down to a specific rectangular area.  [Learn More](https://github.com/jhuckaby/canvas-plus#crop)

fields.title: Crop X
fields.caption: Left coordinate of the crop rectangle.

fields.title: Crop Y
fields.caption: Top coordinate of the crop rectangle.

fields.title: Crop Width
fields.caption: Width of the crop rectangle in pixels.

fields.title: Crop Height
fields.caption: Height of the crop rectangle in pixels.

tools.title: Curves
tools.description: Apply a custom tonality curve.  [Learn More](https://github.com/jhuckaby/canvas-plus#curves)

fields.title: Channels
fields.value: RGB [rgb], RGBA [rgba], Red [r], Green [g], Blue [b], Alpha [a]
fields.caption: Channels to curve.

tools.title: Emboss
tools.description: Apply an emboss effect.  [Learn More](https://github.com/jhuckaby/canvas-plus#emboss)

fields.title: Channels
fields.value: RGB [rgb], RGBA [rgba], Red [r], Green [g], Blue [b], Alpha [a]
fields.caption: Channels to emboss.

tools.title: Expand
tools.description: Expand the canvas around the image.  [Learn More](https://github.com/jhuckaby/canvas-plus#expand)

fields.title: Background Color
fields.caption: New canvas background color. Leave blank for transparent.

fields.title: Alignment
fields.value: Center [center], North [north], Northeast [northeast], East [east], Southeast [southeast], South [south], Southwest [southwest], West [west], Northwest [northwest]
fields.caption: Original image alignment inside the expanded canvas.

tools.title: Find Edges
tools.description: Apply an edge detection filter.  [Learn More](https://github.com/jhuckaby/canvas-plus#findedges)

fields.title: Channels
fields.value: RGB [rgb], RGBA [rgba], Red [r], Green [g], Blue [b], Alpha [a]
fields.caption: Channels to process.

tools.title: Flatten
tools.description: Flatten transparency against a background color.  [Learn More](https://github.com/jhuckaby/canvas-plus#flatten)

tools.title: Gaussian Blur
tools.description: Apply a higher quality Gaussian blur.  [Learn More](https://github.com/jhuckaby/canvas-plus#gaussianblur)

fields.title: Edge Mode
fields.value: Repeat [repeat], Wrap [wrap], Mirror [mirror], Discard [discard]
fields.caption: How out-of-bounds pixels are handled.

fields.title: Channels
fields.value: RGBA [rgba], RGB [rgb], Red [r], Green [g], Blue [b], Alpha [a]
fields.caption: Channels to blur.

tools.title: Opacity
tools.description: Adjust the image opacity.  [Learn More](https://github.com/jhuckaby/canvas-plus#opacity)

tools.title: Posterize
tools.description: Reduce channel tones to discrete levels.  [Learn More](https://github.com/jhuckaby/canvas-plus#posterize)

fields.title: Channels
fields.value: RGB [rgb], RGBA [rgba], Red [r], Green [g], Blue [b], Alpha [a]
fields.caption: Channels to posterize.

tools.title: Quantize
tools.description: Reduce the image to an indexed color palette before writing PNG or GIF output.  [Learn More](https://github.com/jhuckaby/canvas-plus#quantize)

fields.title: Quantize Mode
fields.value: High Quality [quantize], Fast [quantizeFast]
fields.caption: Choose quality or speed for palette reduction.

fields.title: Dither Type
fields.value: Floyd-Steinberg [FloydSteinberg], Stucki [Stucki], Atkinson [Atkinson], Jarvis [Jarvis], Burkes [Burkes], Sierra [Sierra]
fields.caption: Dither algorithm for high quality quantize mode.

fields.title: Fast RGB Crush
fields.caption: RGB posterization level used by fast quantize mode.

fields.title: Fast Alpha Crush
fields.caption: Alpha posterization level used by fast quantize mode.

tools.title: Sharpen
tools.description: Apply a sharpening convolution filter.  [Learn More](https://github.com/jhuckaby/canvas-plus#sharpen)

fields.title: Edge Mode
fields.value: Repeat [repeat], Wrap [wrap], Mirror [mirror], Discard [discard]
fields.caption: How out-of-bounds pixels are handled.

fields.title: Channels
fields.value: RGBA [rgba], RGB [rgb], Red [r], Green [g], Blue [b], Alpha [a]
fields.caption: Channels to sharpen.

tools.title: Solarize
tools.description: Apply a solarize curve effect.  [Learn More](https://github.com/jhuckaby/canvas-plus#solarize)

fields.title: Channels
fields.value: RGB [rgb], RGBA [rgba], Red [r], Green [g], Blue [b], Alpha [a]
fields.caption: Channels to solarize.

tools.title: Temperature
tools.description: Warm or cool the image colors.  [Learn More](https://github.com/jhuckaby/canvas-plus#temperature)

tools.title: Threshold
tools.description: Force channel values above or below a cutoff.  [Learn More](https://github.com/jhuckaby/canvas-plus#threshold)

fields.title: Channels
fields.value: RGB [rgb], RGBA [rgba], Red [r], Green [g], Blue [b], Alpha [a]
fields.caption: Channels to threshold.

tools.title: Transform
tools.description: Rotate, flip, or apply a custom transform matrix to each image.  [Learn More](https://github.com/jhuckaby/canvas-plus#transform)

fields.title: Transformation
fields.value: Rotate [rotate], Flip Horizontal [fliph], Flip Vertical [flipv], 3x3 Matrix [matrix]
fields.caption: Choose one transform operation.

fields.title: Rotation Angle
fields.caption: Degrees to rotate when the transform mode is Rotate.

fields.title: 3x3 Matrix
fields.caption: Optionally set the first 6 elements of the 3x3 transform matrix, comma-separated.

fields.title: Fixed Size
fields.caption: Keep the original canvas dimensions when rotating instead of expanding to fit.

fields.title: Background Color
fields.caption: Background color exposed by rotation.  Leave blank for transparent.

fields.title: Anti-Aliasing
fields.value: Best [best], Good [good], Fast [fast], Nearest [nearest]
fields.caption: Scaling quality for transform operations.

tools.title: Trim
tools.description: Automatically trim matching edge pixels.  [Learn More](https://github.com/jhuckaby/canvas-plus#trim)

fields.title: Trim Color
fields.caption: Optional color to trim. Leave blank to use the top-left pixel.

params.title: Output
params.caption: Choose the output image format, compression quality, and filename suffix for generated files.  [Learn More](https://github.com/jhuckaby/canvas-plus#write)

params.title: Quality
params.caption: JPEG and WebP quality from `0` to `100`.

params.title: Filename Append
params.caption: Optional text to append to each output filename, just before the extension.
